item.label: When No Featured Image
item.description: How to handle posts without a featured image. Choose "Hide" to keep the image area collapsed.

item.label: Fallback Image URL
item.description: Image URL shown when a post has no featured image. Used only when behavior is "Show Custom Image".

item.label: Slides to Show
item.description: How many slides are visible at once. Lower this on tablet and phone for a better fit.

item.label: Slides to Scroll
item.description: How many slides move each time the carousel advances.

item.label: Gap Between Slides
item.description: Spacing between each slide.

item.label: Variable Slide Width
item.description: Let each slide keep its own width instead of an equal share. Useful for mixed-size images.

item.label: Slide Width
item.description: Fixed width used for each slide when Variable Slide Width is on.

item.label: Autoplay
item.description: Automatically advance the carousel.

item.label: Autoplay Delay
item.description: How long each slide stays before advancing.

item.label: Transition Speed
item.description: How fast the slide animation plays.

item.label: Infinite Loop
item.description: Loop back to the first slide after the last one.

item.label: Drag / Swipe
item.description: Allow visitors to drag or swipe between slides.

item.label: Center Active Slide
item.description: Keep the active slide centered, with a peek of the slides on each side.

item.label: Vertical Direction
item.description: Slide up/down instead of left/right.

item.label: Show Arrows
item.description: Show the previous / next navigation arrows.

item.label: Show Dots
item.description: Show the pagination dots below the carousel.

item.label: Transition Easing
item.description: Easing curve for the slide animation.

item.label: Center Mode Style
item.description: Highlighted scales the active slide up and dims the rest.

item.label: Center Peek
item.description: How much of the neighbouring slides peeks in (classic center mode).

item.label: Arrow Layout
item.description: Overlay sits the arrows over the slides; Alongside places them side by side.

item.label: Center the Arrows
item.description: Place both arrows together at the horizontal center.

item.label: Custom Cursor
item.description: Use a custom cursor when hovering the carousel.

item.label: Arrow Corner Radius
item.description: Set to half the height/width for a circle.

item.label: Arrow Horizontal Offset
item.description: Move the arrows in or out from the carousel edges.

item.label: Active Dot Width
item.description: Optionally widen the active dot for a pill style.

item.label: Dots Spacing Top
item.description: Gap between the carousel and the dots.
